pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh comments indicating salary data is calibrated to BLS OEWS May 2024 release.
Verified by reading task.json description which explicitly requests creation of exactly these four sheets.
Verified by mapping to task.json instructions which specify INDEX-MATCH/VLOOKUP, statistics on groups, three-tier conditional formatting, a two-series scatter chart, and tenure calculations.
Independently verified by counting records in the underlying data file (examples/wps_spreadsheet_env/data/employee_compensation.csv). Found exactly 36 records with 18 'F' and 18 'M' gender values.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating four specific calculation and chart sheets based on an HR dataset. The underlying dataset consists of synthetic records calibrated to BLS OEWS May 2024. Independent analysis confirmed it contains exactly 36 employees, split evenly across genders (18 Female, 18 Male).
